title: Durable Farmland
description: Farmlands have hit the gym. Now when jumping on them, they no longer break! Simple and small feature to say the least, but a still life saver at that!
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/514389a84b2a72836c697bfb2591dc4afb654cae.png)
Farmlands can no longer be trampled! This can be toggled on and off using a game rule too (off by default, since i'm assuming you want them gone already if you're downloading the mod)!
Small mod, yes, that's it, stop reading now, go play!
